text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Oka Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume can only challenge this race once in
their lifetime. Because of that, many aspire to run
in it... and seize the tiara for their year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That means today will be Nishino Flower's first
and final Oka Sho.
choice_data_list:
(I hope when she looks back on her running
today, she has no regrets!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: How are you feeling, Flower? Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine! Oh, um... You were really thorough
during our strategy recap, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize that I've been so anxious I've been
double-checking things with her over and over
again.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: I am. This is an important race for you.
I am. This is an important race for you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I've worked really hard in
preparation for today, you know!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So... I know today will go well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not just saying that either. Nishino Flower is
the perfect picture of calm right now.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've been feeling that way since this morning. I'll
run the way I want to...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And at the end, you'll be waiting for me with a
proud smile. I've been picturing it all day.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I feel like today's race will tell me what I want to
know...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll be able to find out why I became race-ready
so early!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She flashes me a bright smile. Behind her, the
cheers from the crowd roar in from the far end of
the tunnel.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Don't take your eyes off me, okay, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Just have faith, and wait for me!
